title: File Splitter / Merger
description: Split a file by byte size or part count into .part fragments; merge multiple parts back. All in-browser
disclaimer: Everything runs locally: File.slice for split, Blob for merge. Files are never uploaded.

split.choose: Click or drag to choose a file to split
split.preview: Will be cut into {{count}} parts, each ~{{each}}{{last, select, undefined { · last {{last}}} other { · last {{last}}}}}

merge.choose: Click or drag to choose multiple part files
merge.tip: Files are sorted numerically by name; adjust below if needed
